_comment: Tracks generation and upload status per video. Keys are output directory names (YYYY-MM-DD_topic-slug).

_schema.status: one of: generating | generated | uploading | uploaded | failed

platforms.youtube: one of: pending | uploaded | failed | skipped
platforms.tiktok: one of: pending | queued | uploaded | failed | skipped
platforms.instagram: one of: pending | queued | uploaded | failed | skipped
